blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 7,773 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 51 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: dry, highs of 41°F, gusts to 51 mph.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 30".
